name: torture chamber
hints: A torture chamber with a tiny door. The door leads somewhere unusual.
GO DOOR to go through the tiny door. EAST leads to the armory. NORTH to the dungeon.
The tiny door connects to the graveyard area. NORTH to dungeon, EAST to armory.
notes: Torture chamber with a tiny door (connects to graveyard area/room 19). NORTH to dungeon (room 11), EAST to armory (room 12).
